name: Chocolate and Raspberry Cream Torte
recipeIngredient: 6 tablespoons lower fat margarine (40% corn oil)
1/3 cup Hershey's cocoa or Hershey's European style cocoa
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F. Spray a 15-½ x 10-½ x 1-inch jelly-roll pan with vegetable cooking spray.
2. In a medium saucepan over low heat, melt lower fat margarine; stir in sugar. Remove from heat. Stir in milk, vinegar, and vanilla. Stir together flour, cocoa, and baking soda; gradually add to sugar mixture, stirring until well blended. Pour batter into prepared pan.
3. Bake 16 to 18 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean. Cool for 10 minutes on a wire rack, then remove from the pan and cool completely.
4. Prepare raspberry cream as directed.
5. To assemble, cut cake crosswise into four equal pieces. Place one piece on serving plate; spread 1 tablespoon jam over top. Carefully spread about 3/4 cup raspberry cream over jam. Repeat layering twice, ending with a plain layer on top. Spread remaining 1 tablespoon jam over top. Spoon or pipe the remaining raspberry cream over the jam. Refrigerate torte until ready to serve. Garnish with raspberries, if desired.
6. Cover; refrigerate leftover torte.
